summary: Bloc 2 Final - Vendors & Resource Enrichment testing complete. All 20 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: Vendors page (5 vendors, KPIs, alerts), Resources type filters & badges, ResourceModal type selector + conditional fields, ProjectDetail external costs section, Achats user access.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: filter-type-interne button label 'Interne' is overridden by TYPE_CONFIG.interne spread to display 'INTERNE' - consistent and correct behavior, no issue

Note: achats@altair.fr user shows role 'READ_ONLY' in topbar badge but has vendors.view permission and can access /vendors correctly - profile-level permissions work correctly even if role label differs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seed data (15 resources, 5 external, 32 allocations)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bloc 2 fully tested and passing. Vendors summary: 5 vendors (Capgemini, Accenture, Sopra Steria, IBM France, Atos), 3 regie, 2 forfait, 3 alerts. Accenture TJM variance 20% (Aurore Chaumont 1020€ vs 850€). Sopra Steria forfait 92% consumed (TMA SAP). Cloud Azure project shows 62 K€ régie external costs (JBR Capgemini 38K€ + Kévin Marchand Atos 24K€). All RBAC working: achats user can see vendors. Filter buttons and ResourceModal conditional fields all working.
